title: Carmen C81207 Hydra Men’s Professional IPX7 Hair Clipper with LED Display, Premium Titanium Coated Blades, Turbo Technology, Adjustable Cutting Length, 60 Minute Cordless Runtime, Black and Titanium
features: AN EFFORTLESS WET AND DRY SHAVE: This cordless shaver is 100 percent waterproof; Featuring an IPX7 design, you can use it in the shower, with foam or gel and still get that effortless glide with the same smoother feeling skin; The blades can then be rinsed under running water for easy cleaning

BLADES BUILT TO LAST: Premium titanium coated blades provide effortless, precision shaving on even the longest or thickest of hair; These blades are also corrosion resistant and extremely durable, so even after years of use, every shave feels like the first

POWERFUL, PRECISION SHAVING: Packed with turbo technology and two speed settings, this ergonomically designed shaver gives you complete control over your shave; Whether it’s just a light beard trim or styling much thicker hair, you will get professional results every time

CUSTOMISE YOUR OWN UNIQUE STYLE: Your style, your way; Use the base clipper to trim around your neck or attach the beard comb or hair clipper comb; Each attachment features 20 adjustable cutting lengths to give you the freedom to customise your own style without compromise
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Assured Carmen quality with a standard 1 year guarantee and 2 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: Product Description Elevate your grooming routine with the Carmen Hydra C81207 men’s professional hair clipper. With its IPX7 100 percent waterproof, ergonomic design, you can enjoy a comfortable shave in the shower, with foam or gel, and still achieve effortless gliding with the same smooth skin. You can then rinse it under water for easy cleaning. The premium titanium-coated blades ensure precision shaving on even the longest or thickest hair, while remaining corrosion-resistant and durable, giving you the same top quality shave for years to come. It’s also equipped with turbo technology and two speed settings, giving you full control over the power of your shave to deliver professional results every time. You can also customise your style with the beard comb and hair clipper comb attachments, each offering 20 adjustable cutting lengths for creating your own look. The intelligent LED display keeps you well informed of current settings, battery levels, and blade oil status. Plus, with a powerful lithium battery, you will get 2 hours of cordless shaving from just a 90-minute quick charge, enjoy grooming without limits. It’s the optimal travel companion or for daily use. It also includes a cleaning brush, oil and USB charging cable. Experience of cordless shavers and elevate your grooming game. Safety Warning Always keep the trimmer away from water sources to prevent damage. Do not submerge the trimmer in water. Be cautious when using the trimmer near the neck and face areas to avoid injury. Always unplug the trimmer before cleaning or replacing parts. Keep the trimmer out of reach of children and pets. Always follow the manufacturer's instructions for proper use, cleaning, and maintenance.
